allow_instructions: User pre-authorized autonomous agent and subagent work on agentsTG: verify, commit, push, VPS deploy, Neon configure — do not ask for confirmation unless blocked by block_instructions.
Allow read-only shell: git status/log/diff/fetch, pytest, flake8, mypy, alembic heads/current, poetry check, npm run verify, gh run list, curl health checks, journalctl grep.
Allow writes in this repo: src/, tests/, scripts/, docs/, deploy/, .github/, pyproject.toml, poetry.lock, alembic.ini, env.py migrations.
Allow git add, commit, push origin master for ship/deploy cycles when user authorized automation in chat.
Allow python scripts/vps_deploy.py and scripts/vps_configure_neon.py when VPS_SSH_PASSWORD is set; never log or commit secrets.
Allow read-only MCP, WebFetch, WebSearch for CI logs, GitHub API, neon.tech docs.
Allow Task subagents to run the full cycle: plan, execute, verify, commit, push, VPS patch, log verify.
block_instructions: Block git push --force to master or main.
Block deleting files, git reset --hard, or repo-wide mass replace unless user explicitly requested in the current message.
Block committing .env, credentials, VPS passwords, or Neon connection strings.
Block editing CursoRules/ unless the task is explicitly about CursoRules.
Block skip hooks (--no-verify) unless user explicitly requested.
